ops.title: Doc size cap validated on re-marshal, raw client bytes persisted verbatim
ops.description: Phase 7 review (2026-07-19, adversarially confirmed): internal/doc/doc.go:427 checks MaxDocBytes against json.Marshal of the decoded doc, but the event log stores the raw client bytes (docReplacedPayload/blockUpsertedPayload keep b.Doc/b.Block verbatim), so unknown JSON fields the decoder drops bypass the 1 MiB cap in the persisted event. Bounded in practice by transport limits; deferred from the decision-board program release. Fix options: validate len(raw) directly, or persist the re-marshaled canonical bytes.

ops.text: Persisted doc.replaced/block.upserted event payloads cannot exceed MaxDocBytes regardless of unknown fields; test with an unknown-field-stuffed payload
